title: DorrDPack
description: Official texture pack from the DorrD content creator. A collection of texture tweaks that enhance the player experience. Designed to be completed according to your own needs.
body:
## 🗒️ Description

This edition of DorrDPack developed by iDorrD & Cerdin99 removes all content from Vanilla Tweaks and focuses on adding original content, therefore you can complete it according to your own needs. Being a collection of essential texture tweaks, bringing a familiar yet different look to vanilla Minecraft.


The goal of DorrD Pack has been simple: to provide a more experiential version of Minecraft, which is a resource pack capable. Decreases the volume of some very repetitive mobs, even fixing the block textures in the bottom view.


📥 Installation Guide

Download the resource pack ZIP file to your computer.
Do not extract or unzip the file.
Press Windows Key + R to open the Run dialog.
Type %appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks and press Enter.
Move or copy the ZIP file into the resourcepacks folder.
Launch Minecraft and go to Options.
Click on Resource Packs.
Select the new resource pack from the list and click Done.
Wait for the pack to load and enjoy your new textures.
📃 Feature List
  • Alternate Block Destruction
  • Village's Golem contains flowers
  • Smooth vanilla textures
  • Variants Zombies
  • Re-texture bedrock block
  • Circular sun & moon
  • Shorter Grass (Short and tall)
  • Re-texture +50 block textures
  • Decreases 95% sounds for more peace (rain, thunder, fire, piglins, portal)
  • Hunger Preview
  • Re-texture enchant glint
  • Lowers fire and shield
  • 3D Textures! Bookshelves, Chiseled Bookshelves, chains, Amethyst, Redstone, Items, Ladders, Mace (new), Rails, Iron Bars, Sugar Cane and much more.
  • Configure your crosshair! You personalize the crosshair.
  • And fixes your Minecraft! Fix the item stitching, cactus, big dripleaf stem, blaze's rods, items holding, and clouds.
